Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that objects fit better in the game world, improving gameplay experience.

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that custom 3D models appear at the right size in games, improving the overall experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixInstanceUvOffset

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialMeshScaling

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that special meshes look better and fit properly in the game.

Added_Other.purpose: Players can enjoy a more personalized and visually appealing text style in games.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks changes in the codebase dynamically.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and fixes in real-time.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Provides more accurate and timely updates for dynamic text, improving clarity for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a faster method to retrieve version control information.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances system performance by speeding up version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps to reduce processing time.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance for time-related features, making them quicker.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWeCanHaveFonts_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the use of custom fonts in games and interfaces.
Removed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to create more visually appealing and unique text styles in their games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAllowPurchasesOutsideExperience_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables purchases to be made from outside the game experience.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to buy items without being in the game, making shopping easier.
